subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was seen. That which thou didst write hath been accepted in the sight of God, inasmuch as thou didst seek His good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت مشاهده شد آنچه نوشتی نزد حق مقبول چه که رضای الهی را خواستی اگر در این
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @presence of; reunion with God, @thankfulness; gratitude
